query:
-- 1. 创建合伙人记录
INSERT INTO partners (userId, name, phone, profitRatio, createdBy, isActive)
VALUES (16800186, 'test', '16800186', '0.30', 1, 1);

-- 2. 获取刚创建的partnerId
SET @newPartnerId = LAST_INSERT_ID();

-- 3. 创建partner_cities记录（关联重庆城市）
INSERT INTO partner_cities (partnerId, cityId, contractStatus, currentProfitStage, isInvestmentRecovered, createdBy)
VALUES (@newPartnerId, 3, 'active', 1, 0, 1);

-- 4. 验证创建结果
SELECT 
  p.id as partnerId,
  p.name as partnerName,
  p.userId,
  u.name as userName,
  c.name as cityName,
  pc.contractStatus
FROM partners p
LEFT JOIN users u ON p.userId = u.id
LEFT JOIN partner_cities pc ON pc.partnerId = p.id
LEFT JOIN cities c ON pc.cityId = c.id
WHERE p.userId = 16800186;
